age: Began at age three, continued through adulthood. Was nine or ten in 1963, sixteen when his clone impersonated him, and graduated college when the experiments concluded.
date_of_encounter: Beginning around 1956-1957 (when he was three) and continuing through adulthood; a significant event occurred in 1963.
entity_type: humanoid; described as 'little men,' 'space men,' 'space travelers,' or 'Star People.' Some looked human, some taller and whiter, others only a little like humans. They had big heads, massive and evil eyes, wrinkled and scaly skin, and were short (did not reach Stephen's shoulders).
narrative_summary: Stephen, a Garifuna man from Belize, recounts his lifelong experiences with 'Sky People' who began abducting him at age three. He describes being taken aboard their spaceship, subjected to experiments, and introduced to a clone of himself in 1963. This clone was trained by Stephen to live on another planet. Stephen's encounters continued until he graduated from college, at which point the entities declared their experiment complete. Despite the interference, Stephen expresses a sense of hope derived from the knowledge of other worlds and advanced beings.
